title: Tick 15: ship scripts eval sh that runs the verifier across all 40 D1+D2 pairs and emits a confusion matrix
question: Does scripts eval sh run the python HeuristicVerifier across the 20 passing and 20 failing fixture pairs and emit a confusion matrix JSON at evals results that records TP FN TN FP plus accuracy precision and recall?
success_criteria: scripts eval sh exists with three subcommands accepting --floor --python and --out flags and an integrated --help
running scripts eval sh against the current D1+D2 fixture set emits evals results 2026-05-22 json with totals confusion_matrix metrics and a per-pair pairs array
the confusion matrix on the canonical floor 3.5 records TP equal to 20 FN equal to 0 TN equal to 20 FP equal to 0 with accuracy precision and recall all equal to 1.0
the script exits non-zero when any false positive or false negative is observed so a future regression flips CI red

capabilities: scripts eval sh present and executable with flag parsing
evals results 2026-05-22 json emitted with confusion matrix and per-pair details
TP=20 FN=0 TN=20 FP=0 on the canonical floor
exit code conveys regression signal for CI integration
